nodes.label: AI as efficient search and extraction tool
nodes.grounding_span: it is a great tool when you give key words or phrases

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the reliability of AI isn't yet where it needs to be and models tend to lean towards being sycophantic

nodes.label: AI as objective research partner
nodes.grounding_span: make the models strictly objective, so that they can be functional research tools

nodes.label: AI for large-scale data handling
nodes.grounding_span: many of the models I've experimented with have difficulty managing large amounts of data without error

nodes.label: Scientific objectivity and rigor
nodes.grounding_span: Objectivity is what all researchers strive for

nodes.label: Positive evaluation of AI for targeted extraction
nodes.grounding_span: it is a great tool when you give key words or phrases

nodes.label: Negative evaluation of AI for interpretation due to sycophancy
nodes.grounding_span: the reliability of AI isn't yet where it needs to be and models tend to lean towards being sycophantic

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for objective AI
nodes.grounding_span: make the models strictly objective, so that they can be functional research tools

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI for large data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: many of the models I've experimented with have difficulty managing large amounts of data without error

nodes.label: Systematic cross-verification — uses multiple tools to validate AI output
nodes.grounding_span: utilize tools like PDF readers to identify target key words/phrases, which highlights the areas where they appear

nodes.label: Principled boundary-setting — distinguishes between AI-appropriate and AI-inappropriate tasks based on scientific values
nodes.grounding_span: I would not yet use AI to interpret or apply data/information to any of my research work
